waste_input: 500 liters of used industrial hydraulic oil
expected_compliance_rule: Must be handled by a certified hazardous waste transporter. Cannot be mixed with other solvents.
expected_action: Route to nearest oil re-refining facility.
key_metric: High risk of EPA/Local Environmental fines if dumped.

expected_action: Query scrap metal market prices. Route to highest-paying local scrap yard.
key_metric: Positive ROI (Revenue generation) and massive carbon offset compared to mining new copper.

waste_input: 150 kg of mixed corporate E-Waste (old servers, laptops, batteries)
expected_compliance_rule: Requires strict data destruction certification (e.g., R2 or e-Stewards) and heavy metal containment.
expected_action: Route to certified e-waste recycler with data-wiping capabilities.
key_metric: Data security compliance + lead/lithium environmental protection.
